title: Control frontmatter schema
description: Schema for CTRL artifacts — enforceable, auditable statements derived from business requirements (BRQ). A control specifies what must be enforced and proven. CTRL answers 'what must be enforced/proven' and bridges BRQ (why) to FR/NFR (what the system shall do). Used in compliance-driven projects; optional for standard projects.

status.description: identified: control need recognized; defined: control statement written; allocated: derived FR/NFR created; implemented: all derived FR/NFR implemented; verified: evidence collected and confirmed; audited: external or internal audit passed; deprecated: no longer applicable

derives_from.description: Wiki links to parent BRQ artifacts this control enforces

derived_requirements.description: Wiki links to FR/NFR/CON artifacts that implement this control

verification_method.description: How compliance with this control is verified (INCOSE verification methods)

evidence_type.description: Type of evidence required to prove compliance

evidence_location.description: Path or URI where evidence is stored or will be stored

compliance_deadline.description: Date by which this control must be verified (YYYY-MM-DD)

audit_status.description: Current audit state for this control

control_family.description: Control family or category (e.g., AC — Access Control, AU — Audit, SC — System and Communications)

related_ctrls.description: Wiki links to related CTRL artifacts

verified_by.description: Wiki links to TEST artifacts that verify this control
